title: Pere's Super Sandwiches
description: A mod about making extraordinary Sandwiches!
body:
# About 🔖

**Pere's Super Sandwiches** focuses in the creation of different types of sandwiches, these sandwiches will give you different abilities that you can use to survive and replenish your food bar like never before! You will be able to discover many different uses for them, from faster exploration to luckier fishing trips, try them all!

# What's inside 👀

* New Super Sandwiches with different abilities
* Many new items
* Advancements made specifically for the mod
* New recipes for vanilla items

**And more to come...!**

# The Sandwiches (just a few of them) 🥪 

 Here's a screenshot with some of the sandwiches, from a Teriyaki one, to an... Iron Sandwich? There's even a mining sandwich for those who crave insta-mining action, discover the rest while playing!

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Pererillo/super_sandwiches_mod_1.20/master/src/main/resources/super_sandwiches_ss1.png)

# And advancements to guide you! 🏆

![Several advancements from the Pere's Super Sandwiches mod inside Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0e0bae0ad7a3c358ff392f9d27e5a9aaf4c779.png)

# Feedback 📩

## If you like this mod I invite you to follow it if you want to hear about new updates (I'll update the mod as fast as I can).

# How to install 📲

* Install Forge
* Type %appdata% in Windows Search and click on it
* In the .minecraft folder put the mod in a folder named "mods"
* **Let's make some sandwiches!**
